channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Think everything is available on streaming? These overlooked…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Think everything is available on streaming? These overlooked jazz classics suggest otherwise.
item.content:encoded: Think everything is available on streaming? These overlooked jazz classics suggest otherwise.

item.title: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments.
item.content:encoded: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments.

item.title: Happy 30th birthday to Jonatan “Yung Lean” Håstad 🍾
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Happy 30th birthday to Jonatan “Yung Lean” Håstad 🍾
item.content:encoded: Happy 30th birthday to Jonatan “Yung Lean” Håstad 🍾

item.title: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy.
item.content:encoded: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy.

item.title: Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due to the air quality.

Her band played an instrumental set without her while wearing N95 masks under their regular masks.

Then Gojira took stage with a drummer named Luigi filling in for Mario.

stereogum.com/2505648/popp...
item.content:encoded:
Metal-pop star Poppy was a no-show to her Upheavel set, due to the air quality.

Her band played an instrumental set without her while wearing N95 masks under their regular masks.

Then Gojira took stage with a drummer named Luigi filling in for Mario.

stereogum.com/2505648/popp...

item.title: Just in: Two U.S. service members were killed in action wh…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
Just in:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.
item.content:encoded:
Just in:

Two U.S. service members were killed in action while "partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks," U.S. Central Command said Saturday.

item.title: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction, as Trump demands explanation from Canada.
item.content:encoded: Wildfire smoke and unhealthy air persist and shift direction, as Trump demands explanation from Canada.

item.title: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice organization Zero Hour
item.content:encoded: Clairo has shared a new track to benefit the climate justice organization Zero Hour

item.title: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.
item.content:encoded: Dr. Zeke Emanuel, a renowned U.S. health policy physician, takes on the wellness industry with a back-to-basics approach to optimizing good health.

item.title: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")
item.content:encoded: Last night, Pavement played their first show since November at the John Waters-hosted Mosswood Meltdown. Following "Harness Your Hopes," they broke out a very unserious cover of "Stairway To Heaven" with Stephen Malkmus singing all incorrect lyrics. (At one point he definitely sang "I like mangos.")

item.title: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)
item.description: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre of rock?
item.content:encoded: Which nu metal album had the biggest impact on this subgenre of rock?

item.title: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guita…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guitar sound that defined Southern rock, and recorded an album that disappeared for 57 years. This is the story of The 2nd Coming.
item.content:encoded: They jammed with Duane Allman, helped pioneer the dual-guitar sound that defined Southern rock, and recorded an album that disappeared for 57 years. This is the story of The 2nd Coming.

item.title: blocking Gracie Abrams bc cyclosporiasis
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: blocking Gracie Abrams bc cyclosporiasis
item.content:encoded: blocking Gracie Abrams bc cyclosporiasis

item.title: U.S. presidents have promised short, decisive wars in Afghan…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: U.S. presidents have promised short, decisive wars in Afghanistan, Iraq and Iran. All have proved much more difficult than advertised and fallen far short of the political goals set at the beginning. n.pr/4yxVtJO
item.content:encoded: U.S. presidents have promised short, decisive wars in Afghanistan, Iraq and Iran. All have proved much more difficult than advertised and fallen far short of the political goals set at the beginning. n.pr/4yxVtJO

item.title: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. NPR’s Scott S…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. NPR’s Scott Simon sat down with Biden, who opened up about his controversial pardoning — and why he didn’t want his father to run for reelection in 2024.
item.content:encoded: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. NPR’s Scott Simon sat down with Biden, who opened up about his controversial pardoning — and why he didn’t want his father to run for reelection in 2024.

item.title: How has your beauty routine changed in the past 10 years? In…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: How has your beauty routine changed in the past 10 years? In 2016, the beauty world was obsessed with 12-step skincare regimens. Now, beauty influencers and experts are experimenting with peptides and looksmaxxing.
item.content:encoded: How has your beauty routine changed in the past 10 years? In 2016, the beauty world was obsessed with 12-step skincare regimens. Now, beauty influencers and experts are experimenting with peptides and looksmaxxing.

item.title: Why are people who weren't born 25 years ago snapping up the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Why are people who weren't born 25 years ago snapping up the digital camera of that era? Blame Taylor Swift, trend cycles, childhood nostalgia and smartphone fatigue.
item.content:encoded: Why are people who weren't born 25 years ago snapping up the digital camera of that era? Blame Taylor Swift, trend cycles, childhood nostalgia and smartphone fatigue.

item.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani had a "Charlie's Garden" cameo in D…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani had a "Charlie's Garden" cameo in Djo's Forest Hills show last night
item.content:encoded: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani had a "Charlie's Garden" cameo in Djo's Forest Hills show last night

item.title: At Tomorrowland, Martin Garrix brought out the Edge to debut…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: At Tomorrowland, Martin Garrix brought out the Edge to debut his latest U2 collab, “Fireflies.” It’s coming out on Friday.
item.content:encoded: At Tomorrowland, Martin Garrix brought out the Edge to debut his latest U2 collab, “Fireflies.” It’s coming out on Friday.

item.title: The longtime Telemundo announcer explains the origins of his…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The longtime Telemundo announcer explains the origins of his famous "Gooooal!" call, the moment a stadium drowned it out and why Argentina's 2022 win brought him to tears. n.pr/4bkqMhh
item.content:encoded: The longtime Telemundo announcer explains the origins of his famous "Gooooal!" call, the moment a stadium drowned it out and why Argentina's 2022 win brought him to tears. n.pr/4bkqMhh

item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against e…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort. n.pr/4fvldxM
item.content:encoded: Kyiv's forces are continuing their aerial campaign against energy infrastructure and military targets inside Russia, aiming to undermine Moscow's war effort. n.pr/4fvldxM

item.title: Last night in Nottingham, Crash Of Rhinos played their first…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Last night in Nottingham, Crash Of Rhinos played their first show since 2013. It was the kickoff of a short tour in support of ‘Logbook,’ the Derby emo revivalists’ first album since that year.
item.content:encoded: Last night in Nottingham, Crash Of Rhinos played their first show since 2013. It was the kickoff of a short tour in support of ‘Logbook,’ the Derby emo revivalists’ first album since that year.

item.title: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. He’s been all…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. He’s been all over the internet in recent months, including appearances with some of his harshest critics, such as ultra-conservative podcasters Candace Owens and Nick Fuentes.
item.content:encoded: Hunter Biden says he has nothing left to hide. He’s been all over the internet in recent months, including appearances with some of his harshest critics, such as ultra-conservative podcasters Candace Owens and Nick Fuentes.

item.title: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people cope if they don't have air conditioning? Here are suggestions from a heat researcher who grew up in a very hot, AC-less place.
item.content:encoded: "Extreme heat" is in the forecast this summer. How do people cope if they don't have air conditioning? Here are suggestions from a heat researcher who grew up in a very hot, AC-less place.

item.title: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting platform during the World Cup. But the company avoids billions of dollars in taxes by insisting it is not a sports gambling operator.
item.content:encoded: The betting site Kalshi emerged as a dominant sports betting platform during the World Cup. But the company avoids billions of dollars in taxes by insisting it is not a sports gambling operator.

item.title: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset the foreign aid agency, have said that no deaths have been linked to the cutting of its funding. These parents tell a different story.
item.content:encoded: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset the foreign aid agency, have said that no deaths have been linked to the cutting of its funding. These parents tell a different story.

item.title: The larvae of a beetle native to South and Central America, …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The larvae of a beetle native to South and Central America, the critters are the perfect solution to sticky problem: How to prepare an animal skeleton for scientific use.
item.content:encoded: The larvae of a beetle native to South and Central America, the critters are the perfect solution to sticky problem: How to prepare an animal skeleton for scientific use.

item.title: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy. n.pr/4fICqos
item.content:encoded: A unique public-private endowment has long shielded Nebraska's cultural scene from federal budget cuts. But a massive state deficit is putting its future in jeopardy. n.pr/4fICqos

item.title: THE SUPER FRUIT、ドラマ「キスは捜査のあとで」OP曲を担当 https://natalie.mu/mus…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
THE SUPER FRUIT、ドラマ「キスは捜査のあとで」OP曲を担当
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681503?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#キスは捜査のあとで #スパフル
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been w…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments. n.pr/4bPtk6Z
item.content:encoded: Yes, there is a way to gracefully address that you've been walking around with spinach in your teeth. Here are tactics to quickly defuse your most embarrassing, cringe-inducing moments. n.pr/4bPtk6Z
